blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: Wren Cole. She says Saturday evening, between approximately nine fifty and ten oh-five, she returned from the bathroom and one of the five was absent from the table. She put it at ten minutes, maybe less. She didn't think about it at the time.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: She says she's not certain. It was a brief absence. The lighting was low. She'd had wine. But when she tries to reconstruct the table — who was where — there's a gap. And the gap is consistent with one person.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: She wouldn't say the name on record. She said she didn't want to accuse anyone based on an uncertain memory.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: Did she tell you off record.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: Because it was the same name as the IP address in Charlotte. Yes.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: You have the direction. You need the tox and the physical analysis on the latch.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: I'm aware of what I need, Mr. Crane.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: Preliminary tox — days. Full screen — weeks. I'm pushing for expedited on the preliminary.
